description_long: This is a modern front-loading washing machine with a metallic silver finish and a large circular glass door on the front. The control panel is located above the door and features a digital display, several buttons, and a rotary dial, all clearly labeled for user interaction. The sides and back of the machine are plain, with the rear panel showing some structural reinforcement and access points for utilities. The door is transparent, allowing a partial view of the stainless steel drum inside. The machine sits on a flat base, suitable for placement on a variety of surfaces. Subtle branding and warning labels are visible on the front panel, adding to its realistic appearance.
description: A metallic silver front-loading washing machine with a large glass door and a digital control panel above. The design is modern, with visible branding and a partially visible drum.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular glass door, control panel with buttons and display, and visible branding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain metallic surface with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the machine's structural paneling and utility access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain metallic surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a digital display, several push buttons, and a rotary dial. The controls are arranged horizontally and are clearly labeled.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading circular glass door with a metallic rim and a visible handle integrated into the rim.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the upper left of the front panel, featuring a red and white design with some readable text.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is located at the top left of the front panel, adjacent to the control panel, and is marked with labeling.
attribute_drum_visibility: The drum is partially visible through the transparent glass door, showing a metallic interior.
